news_items.headline: Dodgers vs. White Sox game chat
news_items.summary: The Dodgers (45-26) go for the series win against the White Sox (37-32) Sunday morning in Chicago. Emmet Sheehan (3-3, 4.70 ERA, 1.21 WHIP) starts for the Dodgers. Erick Fedde (1-5, 4.69 ERA, 1.39 WHIP) takes the mound for the White Sox. Lineups Sunday game info

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Minnesota Twins Sunday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals will wrap up their stay in Minneapolis with a Sunday afternoon game against the Twins. Michael McGreevy will get the start for the Cardinals while the Twins will send Taj Bradley to the mound. First pitch is scheduled for 1:10pm central time and the game TV broadcast will be available at […]

news_items.headline: Astros vs. Royals Game Discussion: 6/14/2026
news_items.summary: TODAY’S GAME: The Houston Astros (33-39) will conclude their six-game trip with the final game of a three-game series against the Kansas City Royals (28-43) today at Kauffman Stadium. May AL Pitcher of the Month, RHP Spencer Arrighetti (7-1, 2.21 ERA) will be on the mound for the Astros, opposite RHP Stephen Kolek (3-1, 3.14 […]

news_items.headline: Yankees At Jays Game Thread
news_items.summary: Game #72. A win would be nice. No Vlad and no Andrés today. Hopefully they will be back quick.
